zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Rostrenen於1300年出生在法國布列塔尼o-度-諾爾德洛斯特倫時，她的父親Pierre V de ROSTRENEN30歲，母親Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ26歲。她和Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1371年5月29日在法國享年71歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Rostrenen was born in 1300, in Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Brittany, France, her father, Pierre V de ROSTRENEN, was 30 and her mother, Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ, was 26. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban. She died on 29 May 1371, in France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Rostrenen est née en 1300, à Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, France, son père, Pierre V de ROSTRENEN, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1371, à France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Rostrenen 1300 in Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre V de ROSTRENEN 30 und ihre Mutter Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ 26. Sie hatte mit Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1371 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Rostrenen è nata il nel 1300 nel Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Pierre V de ROSTRENEN, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban. Morì il 29 maggio 1371, nel Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Rostrenenが1300年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ドウ-ノードロストリーンで生まれた時，父Pierre V de ROSTRENENは30歳，母Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉは26歳であった。彼女はVicomte Alain de Rohan-Montaubanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1371年5月29日にフランスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Rostrenen(이)가 1300년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드-노르드 로스트렌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre V de ROSTRENEN(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1371년 5월 29일 프랑스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Rostrenen nasceu em 1300, em Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Pierre V de ROSTRENEN, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1371, em França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Rostrenen родилась в 1300 г. в местности ростринен, кoтес-ду-норд, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre V de ROSTRENEN было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban. Она умерла 29 мая 1371 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Rostrenen nació en 1300, en Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Pierre V de ROSTRENEN, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Ève du PONT l'ABBÉ, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Vicomte Alain de Rohan-Montauban. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1371, en Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
